en.description_en: These are materials related to Mamiya Rinzō, historical materials classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Tsukubamirai City and was designated on 1992-03-03. It is located in Kamihirayanagi, Tsukubamirai City.

This seated statue of Yakushi Nyorai is a sculpture classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Tsukubamirai City and was designated on 1995-06-01. It is located in the Fukuokadai common land, Tsukubamirai City.

This is a statue of the thousand-armed Kannon (Senju Kannon), a sculpture classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Tsukubamirai City and was designated on 2000-03-31. It is located in Higashikuriyama, Tsukubamirai City.

This standing statue of Amida Nyorai is a sculpture classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Tsukubamirai City and was designated on 2000-03-31. It is located in Buttai, Tsukubamirai City.

en.name_en: Standing Wooden Statue of the Eleven-headed Kannon
en.description_en: This standing wooden statue of the eleven-headed Kannon is a sculpture classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Tsukubamirai City and was designated on 2001-03-27. It is located in the Fukuokadai common land, Tsukubamirai City.

items.name: 鉄火塚（附鉄火棒）
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: This is the Tekka mound, together with an attached tekka rod, a historic site (shiseki) among Japan's designated monuments. It is municipally designated by Tsukubamirai City and was designated on 2001-03-27. It is located in Miyado, Tsukubamirai City.

items.name: 山水双鳥鏡
items.location: 前田村遺跡（田村）より出土

en.description_en: This is a bronze mirror decorated with a landscape and paired birds, an archaeological material classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Tsukubamirai City and was designated on 2008-12-01. It was excavated from the Maedamura site in Tamura, Tsukubamirai City.

en.name_en: Standing Bronze Statue of Fudō Myōō
en.description_en: This standing bronze statue of Fudō Myōō is a sculpture classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Tsukubamirai City and was designated on 2008-12-01. It is located in Ashitaka, Tsukubamirai City.
